seoTitle: AcelaMicro Products | Data Converters, Power Management, Interface ICs | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore AcelaMicro's comprehensive product portfolio including precision data converters, power management ICs, and interface solutions for industrial and automotive applications.

faqs.question: What product categories does AcelaMicro offer?
faqs.answer: AcelaMicro offers four main product categories: Data Converters (ADCs and DACs), Power Management ICs (DC-DC converters, LDOs, battery management), Interface ICs (RS-485, CAN, isolated interfaces), and Sensor Interface solutions (signal conditioning, sensor front-ends). Each category is designed to meet the demanding requirements of industrial and automotive applications with high reliability and performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product categories to find the right solution for your application, or contact our FAE team for personalized recommendations.

faqs.question: How do I select the right AcelaMicro product for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right AcelaMicro product involves several key considerations. First, identify your application requirements including resolution, speed, power consumption, and operating temperature range. For data converters, consider sampling rate and accuracy requirements. For power management, evaluate input/output voltage ranges and current requirements. For interface ICs, determine communication protocol and isolation requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review our detailed product specifications and application notes, or request a consultation with our FAE team for expert guidance.

categories.name: Data Converters
categories.description: AcelaMicro's data converter portfolio includes high-precision ADCs and DACs designed for demanding industrial and automotive applications.
categories.longDescription: AcelaMicro data converter distributor selection guide: Our comprehensive portfolio includes precision SAR ADCs (12-16 bit) for high-speed data acquisition, sigma-delta ADCs (16-24 bit) for precision measurement, and high-resolution DACs for control systems.

selectionGuide.title: How to Select AcelaMicro Data Converters
selectionGuide.description: Comprehensive guide for selecting the right ADC or DAC based on resolution, speed, and application requirements.

faqs.question: How do I choose between successive approximation and sigma-delta ADCs?
faqs.answer: Successive approximation (SAR) ADCs from AcelaMicro offer high sampling rates with moderate resolution (12-16 bits), making them ideal for multiplexed sensor systems. Sigma-delta ADCs provide higher resolution (16-24 bits) at lower sampling rates, perfect for precision measurement applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For multi-channel sensor monitoring, choose SAR ADCs. For high-precision single-channel measurements, select sigma-delta ADCs.

products.name: 16-Bit 4-Channel SAR ADC
products.shortDescription: High-precision 16-bit SAR ADC with 4 differential channels, 1 MSPS sampling rate, and SPI interface for industrial sensor applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The ACM1604 is a high-performance 16-bit successive approximation register (SAR) analog-to-digital converter featuring four differential input channels.
With a sampling rate of 1 MSPS and excellent DC accuracy (INL: +/- 1 LSB), this ADC is ideal for multi-channel sensor monitoring and industrial control systems.
The device operates from a single 5V supply and includes an internal reference, programmable gain amplifier, and robust ESD protection.

faqs.question: What is the maximum input voltage for the ACM1604?
faqs.answer: The ACM1604 accepts differential input voltages up to +/- Vref. With the internal 4.096V reference, the maximum differential input is +/- 4.096V. The absolute maximum rating for analog inputs is -0.3V to AVDD + 0.3V.
